name: Enneacraft - Atil.SPIA
text: After this card was flipped face-up, while it is in the Monster Zone, your opponent cannot activate cards or effects in response to their card or effect activation. When your opponent activates a card or effect as Chain Link 3 or higher (Quick Effect): You can change this face-down card to face-up Defense Position; negate the activation of your opponent's cards and effects activated before this card in this Chain, and if you do, destroy them. You can reveal this card in your hand; Special Summon 1 monster from your hand in face-down Defense Position. You cannot Special Summon the turn you activate this effect, except in face-down Defense Position.
pendulum_text: Each time a monster(s) is flipped face-up, place 1 E.C. Counter on this card. At the end of the Battle Phase, if you have an "Enneacraft" card in your other Pendulum Zone: You can target 1 monster your opponent controls with less ATK than this card; destroy it.
